content.problemStatement: Print the number 108108108 using arithmetic operations on the numbers 999 and 121212.
constraints: No constraints as no input is required.
content.inputFormat: No input is required for this problem.
content.outputFormat: Print the integer 108108108 on a single line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program has no input; it directly prints the required constant.
Even without any input, the output remains the constant 108108108.
Repeated execution still yields the same constant value.

solution.approach: Since the problem requires printing a constant value, the approach is straightforward. The algorithm simply prints the required number without any computation.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) per test case, O(1) total. No precomputation is needed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) — The space complexity is constant as no additional space is used that scales with input size.
